rationale: Ukraine doubling logistics attacks and reclaiming territory is a qualitative positive military development directly affecting the lives and safety of Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: A qualitative escalation in Ukraine's offensive operations — more territory reclaimed and intensified logistics strikes — directly and positively shifts the war situation for Ukrainian civilians.

top_events.title: Iran deal stalemate: US attention partially diverted from Ukraine aid
top_events.summary: Continued Iran negotiations keep US diplomatic bandwidth occupied, with potential indirect effect on the pace and focus of Western military aid to Ukraine.

top_events.title: Violence escalates in Israel amid ultra-Orthodox draft protests
top_events.summary: Internal Israeli instability could marginally distract Western attention from Ukraine, but no direct military or aid impact on Ukraine is evident this cycle.
